title: The Lady of the Harem
writer: James Elroy Flecker, James T. O'Donohoe
actors: Ernest Torrence, William Collier Jr., Greta Nissen
plot: The glittering province of Khorasan groans under the heavy taxes and cruelties imposed by its tyrannical sultan; only Hassan, the kind-hearted confectioner, lives tranquilly. He joins Rafi, who arrives in the city in search of his...
